expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers this focus: it states the checklist is "derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios" and cites code-level enforcement in `skill_snapshot/scripts/lib/finalPlanSummary.mjs`: "extractDeveloperSmokeRows() filters to scenarios that are `<P1>` or contain `[ANALOG-GATE]`" and "writes `context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md`".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: result.md and execution_notes.md both tie the checkpoint to Phase 7: execution_notes.md says it verified "Phase 7 contract alignment" and the "developer smoke checklist ... during Phase 7"; result.md says the smoke output "is produced as part of Phase 7 finalization tooling (`finalPlanSummary.mjs`), consistent with the Phase 7 contract" and cites `skill_snapshot/SKILL.md` and `skill_snapshot/reference.md` for Phase 7 outputs/gating.
